$comment: Team-shared Claude Code settings for openclaw-nodedev. Personal overrides go in settings.local.json. The scope-check hook enforces memory-plan/MASTER_PLAN.md §6.2 — every Edit/Write/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit is gated by memory-plan/SCOPE.md. See memory-plan/MASTER_PLAN.md for the discipline; .claude/hooks/scope-check.sh for the implementation.
